sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ مَشْرُوعاً جَدِيداً لِحِمَايَةِ الْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je započela novi projekat za zaštitu okoliša.
sentences.translationEn: The government started a new project to protect the environment.

sentences.arabic: سَيَقُومُ الْمُتَطَوِّعُونَ بِزِرَاعَةِ أَلْفِ شَجَرَةٍ فِي الْغَابَاتِ الْقَرِيبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volonteri će zasaditi hiljadu stabala u obližnjim šumama.
sentences.translationEn: Volunteers will plant a thousand trees in nearby forests.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى تَقْلِيلِ التَّلَوُّثِ فِي الْمُدُنِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat ima za cilj smanjenje zagađenja u velikim gradovima.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to reduce pollution in big cities.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ فِي هَذِهِ الْمُبَادَرَةِ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi učenici su učestvovali u ovoj lijepoj inicijativi.
sentences.translationEn: Many students participated in this beautiful initiative.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْوَزِيرُ إِنَّ الْأَشْجَارَ تُسَاعِدُ فِي تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ministar je rekao da drveće pomaže u poboljšanju kvaliteta zraka.
sentences.translationEn: The minister said that trees help improve air quality.
